commands.review_summary:
The PR broadens the Feishu plugin with streaming, dedupe, abort/recall handling, contacts/groups/send/calendar tools and skills, plus daemon working-directory handling.

Reproducibility: yes. for the review blockers by source inspection: PR-head code shows timestamp-only create_time rejection, unbounded dedupe state, account-global caches, direct abort without the held processing claim, and a local file_path upload tool. I did not reproduce live Feishu behavior because no real Feishu proof or credentials are attached.
commands.review_followup: Needs contributor real Feishu proof plus maintainer Feishu/security product review; automation cannot supply the contributor's live proof or decide bundled ops/file-send policy.
